__fixture__.name: stale evidence downgrade narrows strong claims
__fixture__.scenario: When certification or compatibility evidence is stale, the badge group narrows: freshness becomes Stale, certification becomes Retest pending, and the support-class claim downgrades below Supported.
contract_sections: Visible downgrade on aging and narrowing
Allowed combinations and denial / downgrade rules

support_class.explanation_sentence: Because required evidence is stale, the surface narrows the support claim below Supported until re-qualification is complete.

lifecycle.explanation_sentence: The capability lifecycle posture remains stable; the downgrade here is about evidence freshness, not lifecycle maturity.

channel.explanation_sentence: This build carries the capability on the stable release channel; stale evidence still forces claim narrowing.

freshness.explanation_sentence: Backed evidence is outside its freshness window; until refreshed, strong compatibility/support claims must not remain in their strongest posture.

client_scope.explanation_sentence: The narrowed claim is scoped to desktop surfaces; other clients must not infer parity from a stale badge group.

certified_archetype_state.explanation_sentence: Certification/compatibility proof is stale; the row must be retested before it can be treated as supported again.

compatibility_state.explanation_sentence: With stale evidence, the surface no longer renders the strongest compatibility language; it narrows to a limited posture pending retest.

expected_projection.export_text: Stale · Retest pending · Community · 3 more (Lifecycle, Channel, Client scope)
